title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of sports and fitness programs, including team sports such as basketball, volleyball, flag football, tball and soccer. Snacks, meals, and nutrition education are also provided. 1395 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 581-7383 1029 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 581-7383 Main phone Main phone (503) 581-7383 ext 1029 Kyle Buse [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Membership fee is $25 annually. Sport fees varies by program. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Program hours vary between school year and summer. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Summer and Hood Streets Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
